channel.title: MoneySignals Daily Blog
channel.description: Plain-English daily market signals: news, Washington activity, short flow, sentiment, and model watchlists. Educational only.

item.title: Cautious Tone Dominates Broadly
item.description: Model predictions skew meaningfully bearish (119 vs 86 bullish signals), and the Crypto Fear & Greed index sits at a cautious 31/100 ("Fear" territory)…

item.title: Tech Hardware & Semiconductor Renaissance
item.description: The dominant narrative today is a powerful rotation into hardware-adjacent tech, with Semiconductor Materials & Equipment (+7.3%), Technology Hardware…

item.title: Defensive & Hard Asset Rotation Dominates
item.description: The dominant narrative today centers on a flight to safety and real assets. XLE (energy) and GLD (gold) both showing 5B/0b bullish news signals — a clean…

item.title: Cautious Rotation Dominating
item.description: The dominant narrative today is a clear flight from growth/economy-sensitive risk toward defensive and hard-asset plays. Semiconductors (-4.0%) and…

item.title: Cautious Meets Selective optimistic
item.description: The dominant narrative today is a bifurcated market where defensive and hard-asset plays (energy via XLE, gold via GLD) are attracting strong bullish…

item.title: Defense & Hard Assets Rally Dominates

item.title: Energy & Hard Assets Dominate the Narrative
item.description: The strongest and most consistent signal today is a broad-based rally in energy and commodities. XLE, USO, and XOM are all flashing pure bullish sentiment…

item.title: Defense & Hard Assets Surge as cautious Sentiment Dominates

item.title: Defense & Energy Dominance
